description: Create a multi-screen mobile app wireframe for 'CityTransit GO' based on the Product Requirements Document (PRD) at ~/Desktop/transit_app_prd.txt. Using the file ~/Diagrams/transit_app_wireframe.drawio, develop five distinct pages (Home, Trip Planner, Route Results, Route Detail, and Alerts) that strictly follow the PRD's specifications for layout, text labels, and UI components. Include navigation flows between the screens and export the completed wireframe as a PNG to ~/Diagrams/transit_app_wireframe.png.
